overview.tagline: Home of the Meadowlands — where sports, entertainment, and community converge
overview.description: East Rutherford is a borough in southeastern Bergen County best known as the home of MetLife Stadium, the Meadowlands Racetrack, and the American Dream mega-complex. While the Meadowlands Sports Complex dominates its southern portion, the borough's northern residential section is a charming, working-class community with a strong Italian-American heritage, close-knit neighborhoods, and a walkable commercial district along Park Avenue. East Rutherford uniquely straddles major entertainment venues and small-town community life.
overview.schoolDistrict: East Rutherford School District (K-8) / Becton Regional High School District (9-12)
highlights: Home of MetLife Stadium — NFL's New York Giants and New York Jets
American Dream mega entertainment and retail complex
Meadowlands Racetrack — thoroughbred and harness racing
Charming residential community with strong Italian-American roots
Exceptional highway access — NJ Turnpike, Routes 3, 17, and 120

realEstate.assessmentInfo: East Rutherford benefits from one of Bergen County's lowest residential tax rates thanks to substantial commercial ratables from the Meadowlands Sports Complex and surrounding businesses.
realEstate.recentTrends: The housing market is competitive, driven by low taxes and the borough's excellent location. Single-family homes in the residential section sell quickly. New townhouse and condo developments have added modern housing options. The proximity to the Meadowlands entertainment venues adds to the borough's appeal.
neighborhoodNotes: The Park Avenue area is the walkable commercial heart with traditional single-family homes
Carlton Hill offers elevated homes with views toward the Manhattan skyline
Meadowlands area is commercial/entertainment — no residential
Newer townhouse developments near Route 17 offer modern amenities

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash pickup provided twice weekly by the borough's contracted hauler.
details: Collection days vary by neighborhood
Trash in sealed bags or covered containers by 6:00 AM
Maximum weight 50 lbs per container
Bulk pickup by appointment through DPW

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Weekly recycling through the Bergen County Utilities Authority.
details: Commingled recyclables in blue bins
Paper and cardboard collected separately
No plastic bags, Styrofoam, or food waste
BCUA drop-off available for special items

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water provided by Veolia Water. Sewer managed through the borough and BCUA.
details: Quarterly water billing from Veolia
Sewer charges on property tax bills
Report water emergencies to DPW
Water quality reports available annually

permits.title: Building Permits
permits.description: Construction and zoning permits handled by the Building Department.
details: Permits required for all construction and renovation
Special permits may be required in the Meadowlands district
Zoning Board reviews variance applications
Certificate of Occupancy required for new construction

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Municipal parking available in the downtown area. Meadowlands venues have extensive event parking.
details: Free municipal parking near Park Avenue
Metered parking in the business district
Event-day parking at MetLife Stadium and American Dream is separate
Overnight street parking requires permit

additionalServices.title: Recreation Department
additionalServices.description: Active recreation department offering programs for all ages.
details: Youth sports leagues and summer camps
Adult recreation and fitness programs
Senior citizen activities and trips
Borough pool open in summer

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Noise regulations balance residential quiet with the borough's commercial and entertainment activity.
keyRules: Residential construction prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 7:00 PM weekdays
Saturday construction 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
No construction on Sundays or holidays
Event noise at Meadowlands venues regulated by NJSEA
noise.source: Borough of East Rutherford Municipal Code

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Properties must be maintained to borough standards.
keyRules: Lawns must be maintained and kept below 10 inches
Sidewalks must be cleared of snow within 24 hours
No junk vehicles or debris accumulation
Exterior maintenance required for all structures
propertyMaintenance.source: Borough of East Rutherford Municipal Code

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Standard pet control and licensing requirements.
keyRules: Annual dog license required
Dogs must be leashed off owner's property
Clean up after pets immediately
Rabies vaccination required
pets.source: Borough of East Rutherford Municipal Code

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Street and lot parking regulated throughout the borough, with special rules on event days.
keyRules: No overnight street parking without permit
Event-day parking restrictions near Meadowlands venues
Snow emergency parking bans enforced
Commercial vehicle restrictions in residential areas
parking.source: Borough of East Rutherford Municipal Code

rentals.title: Rental Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must be registered and meet housing code.
keyRules: Rental registration required
Certificate of Habitability at tenant turnover
Inspections before new tenant occupancy
Landlords responsible for code compliance
rentals.source: Borough of East Rutherford Municipal Code

other.title: Meadowlands District Regulations
other.summary: Properties in the Meadowlands district are subject to additional NJSEA oversight.
keyRules: Development in the Meadowlands zone requires NJSEA approval
Environmental review required for wetlands-adjacent projects
Special event-day traffic management plans enforced
Stormwater management requirements in flood-prone areas

schools.publicDistrict: East Rutherford School District / Becton Regional High School District

publicSchools.name: Henry P. Becton Regional High School
publicSchools.notes: Regional high school serving East Rutherford and Carlstadt. Wildcats; offers AP courses and career-technical programs.

privateSchools.name: St. Joseph School
privateSchools.notes: Catholic school affiliated with St. Joseph Parish in East Rutherford

nearbyHigherEd: Fairleigh Dickinson University (Teaneck and Metropolitan Campus)

whyMoveHere: Among the lowest property tax rates in Bergen County (thanks to Meadowlands ratables)
Walking distance to MetLife Stadium, American Dream, and world-class entertainment
Charming residential neighborhood with Italian-American character
Excellent highway access to NJ Turnpike, Routes 3 and 17

commuteToNYC.primaryMethod: NJ Transit bus or train from nearby Secaucus Junction
commuteToNYC.trainStation: Secaucus Junction (nearby, NJ Transit Northeast Corridor and other lines)
commuteToNYC.notes: NJ Transit buses provide direct service to the Port Authority Bus Terminal. Secaucus Junction, a major NJ Transit rail hub, is just minutes away for connections to Penn Station. Driving to the Lincoln Tunnel takes 15-20 minutes. The NJ Turnpike and Route 3 provide excellent highway access.

costOfLiving.summary: East Rutherford offers excellent value thanks to low property taxes subsidized by the massive commercial ratable base of the Meadowlands complex.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Property taxes well below the Bergen County and NJ averages; housing costs near average
costOfLiving.vsNationalAverage: Above the national average overall, but property taxes are competitive

pros: Lowest property taxes in Bergen County thanks to Meadowlands ratables
World-class entertainment at MetLife Stadium and American Dream
Charming residential community with strong identity
Growing real estate investment and new development
cons: Heavy event-day traffic near Meadowlands venues
Industrial/commercial zones adjacent to residential areas
Meadowlands area can experience occasional odor

restaurants.name: Park & Orchard
restaurants.description: Eclectic, beloved restaurant serving creative American cuisine in a quirky, art-filled space. A Bergen County institution.

restaurants.name: Sonny's Pizza
restaurants.description: Classic New Jersey pizzeria serving pies and Italian favorites, beloved by locals for generations.

restaurants.name: Mambo Cafe
restaurants.description: Latin American restaurant and lounge with Cuban and Colombian dishes in a lively setting.

restaurants.name: Gia Trattoria
restaurants.description: Italian trattoria with homemade pasta, wood-fired pizza, and a warm neighborhood atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Meadowlands Diner
restaurants.description: Classic NJ diner open late with a massive menu, popular before and after stadium events.

parks.name: Sesselman Park
parks.description: Borough park with athletic fields, playground, walking paths, and community gathering space.

parks.name: Riggin Memorial Field
parks.description: Athletic complex with football field, track, and stands used for school and community events.

parks.name: DeKorte Park
parks.description: Meadowlands nature area (in nearby Lyndhurst) with boardwalk trails, bird watching, and wetlands views.

events.name: East Rutherford Community Day
events.description: Annual borough celebration with food, games, rides, live entertainment, and fireworks.

events.name: NFL Game Days
events.description: MetLife Stadium hosts 20+ NFL games per season for both the Giants and Jets, bringing tens of thousands of fans to the borough.

events.name: Columbus Day Parade
events.description: Annual parade celebrating Italian-American heritage, reflecting the borough's cultural roots.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Community holiday event with tree lighting, caroling, and seasonal festivities.

attractions.name: MetLife Stadium
attractions.description: 82,500-seat stadium home to the NFL's New York Giants and New York Jets. Also hosts major concerts, international soccer matches, and special events.
attractions.address: 1 MetLife Stadium Dr, East Rutherford, NJ 07073

attractions.name: American Dream
attractions.description: 3-million-square-foot entertainment and retail mega-complex featuring Nickelodeon Universe theme park, DreamWorks Water Park, an NHL-sized ice rink, LEGOLAND Discovery Center, Sea Life Aquarium, and hundreds of stores.
attractions.address: 1 American Dream Way, East Rutherford, NJ 07073

attractions.name: Meadowlands Racetrack
attractions.description: Premier harness racing venue with year-round racing, simulcasting, and entertainment events.

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets on the first and third Monday of each month at 7:00 PM
government.meetingLocation: East Rutherford Borough Hall, 1 Everett Place, East Rutherford, NJ 07073

fire.address: East Rutherford Fire Department, East Rutherford, NJ 07073
